text.title: Program Dependency Aging Chart Recipe — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the program have a dependency graph, ≥3 teams, weekly cadence, and a named PM?

branch.when: graph_present == true AND teams_count >= 3 AND cadence_weekly == true AND named_pm == true
branch.conclusion: Plot the aging chart weekly; route entries > 14 days to the program PM for re-baseline.
Block. Build the dependency graph first (see `dependency-graph-reasoning`).
Skip. Chart adds no signal at this scale or cadence.
